arts.ttl: Newcastle v Man City: FPL team news + predicted line-ups
arts.sum: Team form, absentees and our predicted XIs The post Newcastle v Man City: FPL team news + predicted line-ups appeared first on Best FPL Tips, Advice, Team News, Picks, and Statistics from Fantasy Football Scout.

arts.ttl: Man City predicted lineup vs Newcastle
arts.sum: After two games in the space of three days, drawing with title rivals Arsenal before beating Watford in the Carabao Cup, Pep Guardiola has some more squad rotation to do and, to complicate matters even further, is now without midfield star Rodri for the rest of the season . CB: Ruben Dias - One of many players given a rest on Tuesday, Dias should return to City's starting lineup as their primary leader in defence.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta makes promise to Pep Guardiola as Arsenal and Man City rivalry explodes
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta says there is no chance his friendship with Pep Guardiola will be destroyed by increasingly heated on-pitch battles between Arsenal and Manchester City

arts.ttl: Guardiola optimistic in spite of Rodri absence
arts.sum: Pep Guardiola says he’s optimistic he and his team will plot a route forward this season without Rodri. City have coped with challenging injuries before – like Fernandinho at the close of the successful 2018/19 season and Kevin De Bruyne at the start of the triumphant 2023/24 campaign - and Guardiola is looking for a similar response this time around without Rodri.

arts.ttl: 'I couldn't be happier at City' says Rico Lewis
arts.sum: The 19-year-old has started the new season in sparkling form and has won praise for Pep Guardiola for his high quality displays in the seven games he has so far featured in. “Obviously I had a chance in pre-season to play all of the games because some of the lads were away at the Euros and then needed a bit of a rest which was good for me.

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola declares "war" on Mikel Arteta after Arsenal manager's comments
arts.sum: Manchester City manager Pep Guardiola issues a spiky response to Mikel Arteta's recent cryptic comments about his team as the 'dark arts' furore continues.

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola tells Arsenal to prepare for ‘a war’ with Manchester City
arts.sum: Guardiola has also called on opposite number Mikel Arteta to explain himself after claiming he had “all the information” about City.

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola demands answers from Mikel Arteta after Arsenal chief's cryptic message
arts.sum: Manchester City manager Pep Guardiola has thrown down the gauntlet to Mikel Arteta after the Arsenal chief claimed to know all of his former club's secrets this week

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta makes honest admission over "war Arsenal cannot win" amid Man City criticism
arts.sum: Arsenal host Leicester on Saturday afternoon with fall out from last weekend's draw away to Manchester City still rumbling on - yet for Mikel Arteta the debate around streetwise approach is one that he cannot win

arts.ttl: Pep asks for clarity over Arteta's Man City 'dark arts' comments
arts.sum: Manchester City manager Pep Guardiola has demanded clarity from Arsenal counterpart Mikel Arteta over his comments about the Premier League champions' "dark arts".
